title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
